ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* URLs to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team1 won, Team2 won, Draw) */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, playoff, friendly) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's standing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "previous_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager's previous team (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_previous_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the venue owner or organization */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the match report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
